codeReview.summary: The fix narrows sales-order accounting lifecycle mapping to canonical posting markers only: orders stay accounting-ineligible until dispatch-owned invoice truth exists, then advance to pending and posted only when the corresponding invoice and journal markers are present. The added helper and invoice-surface regressions directly cover the original failure and I did not find a new truth-rails regression in the reviewed diff.

summary: Pass. The original overstatement bug in BusinessDocumentTruths is resolved and SOURCE_ORDER references now stay NOT_ELIGIBLE before posting truth exists.
